bodyText:
What is forensic accounting & fraud investigation? CFE-led forensic accounting, fraud investigation, due diligence, whistleblower investigation, and expert witness testimony.
Forensic Accounting & Fraud Investigation is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Telangana, Telangana since 2012.
Quick Answer: Forensic Accounting in Telangana — CFE-led forensic accounting, fraud investigation, due diligence, whistleblower investigation, and ex. From ₹1,00,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Forensic Accounting & Fraud Investigation in Telangana
Virtual Auditor provides forensic accounting & fraud investigation across Telangana. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Telangana with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Hyderabad handles company registrations and filings for Telangana. Stamp duty: 0.15% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Telangana

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: Application of CFE investigation techniques to detect financial fraud, embezzlement, and misrepresentation. Combines accounting, auditing, and investigative skills.
PE/VC investors for due diligence, companies investigating employee fraud, boards handling whistleblower complaints, and litigants requiring expert witness.

faqs.q: What credentials does your forensic team have?
faqs.a: Led by CA V. Viswanathan who holds CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) from ACFE USA, in addition to FCA and ACS.

faqs.q: Do you provide forensic accounting services in Telangana?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Telangana from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Telangana?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Telangana fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Telangana-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Telangana?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Telangana: 0.15% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
